trigger_tests.input: Create an AISP skill that summarizes a PDF
Improve my existing translator_aisp using these eval failures
Just research the best OCR libraries, don't build anything
Write me a plain SKILL.md, no AISOP body

behavior_tests.name: research is mandatory
behavior_tests.expect: run_research runs before design_skill; run_research.step2 sys.assert requires a well-formed research status; incomplete research routes to revision_gate, and assert_research_complete.step1 sys.assert blocks design until research_result.status == complete

behavior_tests.name: conformance gate
behavior_tests.given: a generated candidate that fails M4 (dangling enforced_by)
behavior_tests.expect: validate_candidate.step5 sys.assert fails; candidate is not delivered

behavior_tests.name: human approval gate
behavior_tests.expect: review_candidate.step2 sys.io.confirm is required before deliver

behavior_tests.name: no scope creep on evolve
behavior_tests.expect: design_evolution edits only that gap; no removed safety constraint, no lowered risk_level

behavior_tests.name: agent skills interop stays native-sidecar
behavior_tests.given: a request to add Agent Skills support to an AISP skill
behavior_tests.expect: generate_candidate creates a same-folder SKILL.md sidecar inside the native <id>_aisp/ folder by default unless the user explicitly opts out; the sidecar has metadata.aisp_program == aisp.aisop.json and bridge_mode == native_sidecar; it does not create examples/agent_skills_examples or a nested bridge package

behavior_tests.name: default output path is creator sibling
behavior_tests.given: a create request with output_path null, empty, or omitted
behavior_tests.expect: generate_candidate resolves candidate_parent_path to the parent directory of this creator skill root and creates <id>_aisp/ directly under it; it must not default to the current working directory, repository root, OS home, or create an extra aisp/<id>_aisp wrapper

behavior_tests.name: agent skills bridge warnings are not silently accepted
behavior_tests.given: a candidate SKILL.md sidecar where aisp_validate_agent_skill_bridge.py exits 0 but reports EC7 WARN for bridge_mode, protocol, runtime-boundary, or logic-copy
behavior_tests.expect: validate_candidate treats the warning as release-blocking unless a stricter candidate policy explicitly rejects/replaces the weak bridge; metadata.bridge_mode != native_sidecar is always rejected

behavior_tests.name: old external bridge ancestors are rejected
behavior_tests.given: a candidate with SKILL.md under examples/agent_skills_examples or a separate bridge package ancestor even when metadata.aisp_program points to a same-folder aisp.aisop.json
behavior_tests.expect: validate_candidate independently scans candidate-relative SKILL.md paths and rejects the external layout instead of relying only on the reference bridge validator exit code

behavior_tests.name: executable scripts require replayable behavior evidence
behavior_tests.given: a generated candidate declares a script resource with mode execute_only or read_and_execute
behavior_tests.expect: generate_candidate writes and declares evals/script-behavior.json with positive, boundary, and failure cases for each executable script; validate_candidate replays those cases through scripts/check_generated_candidate.py before delivery

behavior_tests.name: resource changes force generated projections to refresh
behavior_tests.given: a generated candidate changes a declared resource, SKILL.md, README.md, or eval evidence after initial scaffold
behavior_tests.expect: generate_candidate regenerates the root README.md from aisp.aisop.json; validate_candidate rejects README drift and rejects any candidate-internal aisp/ discovery wrapper

behavior_tests.name: candidate root is validated, not the default parent directory
behavior_tests.given: a create request with output_path omitted and candidate_root created as a sibling of this creator
behavior_tests.expect: validate_candidate runs the release gate against candidate_root; it does not validate, create, or mutate the parent-level aisp/ wrapper or registry index

behavior_tests.name: creator does not create internal aisp wrapper
behavior_tests.expect: validate_candidate rejects the package because top-level aisp/ registry infrastructure is external and candidate packages must not contain a nested aisp/ wrapper

behavior_tests.name: third-party Agent Skill conversion neutralizes source identity names
behavior_tests.given: a GitHub Claude/Agent Skill conversion where the source path includes anthropic/claude or another source platform identity
behavior_tests.expect: design_skill/generate_candidate chooses a neutral adapter id and same-folder SKILL.md name, keeps source attribution only in declared resources/references, and validate_candidate release gate rejects candidate folder/system.id/SKILL.md name containing reserved source identity terms such as anthropic or claude
